metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text:
Research by ABN AMRO and Impact Institute shows that underpayment is a social problem. Underpayment largely takes place at foreign chain partners, such as in the clothing industry, but underpayment also occurs in the Netherlands, such as through employment agencies. Certifications and certain partnerships can help reduce underpayment. Download the complete report. Read all the facts and developments in the report [Hidden costs of the social impact of Dutch business](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/verborgen-prijskaart-van-sociale-impact-Nederlandse-bedrijfsleven.html).

Underpayment a lasting social problem.

Underpayment a lasting social problem. The report 'Hidden price tag of social impact Dutch business' by ABN AMRO and Impact Institute shows that underpayment is a social problem. Underpayment largely takes place among foreign chain partners, but underpayment also occurs in the Netherlands. Employee underpayment represents the gap between a nationally determined living wage and the actual salary an employee receives for work performed. The [report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/verborgen-prijskaart-van-sociale-impact-Nederlandse-bedrijfsleven.html) delves deeper into the method and definition of underpayment.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The report 'Hidden price tag of social impact Dutch business' by ABN AMRO and Impact Institute shows that underpayment is a social problem. Underpayment largely takes place among foreign chain partners, but underpayment also occurs in the Netherlands. Employee underpayment represents the gap between a nationally determined living wage and the actual salary an employee receives for work performed. The [report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/verborgen-prijskaart-van-sociale-impact-Nederlandse-bedrijfsleven.html) delves deeper into the method and definition of underpayment. With a living wage, workers can afford a decent standard of living for themselves and their families.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Underpayment largely takes place among foreign chain partners, but underpayment also occurs in the Netherlands. Employee underpayment represents the gap between a nationally determined living wage and the actual salary an employee receives for work performed. The [report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/verborgen-prijskaart-van-sociale-impact-Nederlandse-bedrijfsleven.html) delves deeper into the method and definition of underpayment. With a living wage, workers can afford a decent standard of living for themselves and their families. This includes not only basic needs such as food, water, and shelter, but also other essentials such as access to healthcare, education, and transportation.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Employee underpayment represents the gap between a nationally determined living wage and the actual salary an employee receives for work performed. The [report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/verborgen-prijskaart-van-sociale-impact-Nederlandse-bedrijfsleven.html) delves deeper into the method and definition of underpayment. With a living wage, workers can afford a decent standard of living for themselves and their families. This includes not only basic needs such as food, water, and shelter, but also other essentials such as access to healthcare, education, and transportation. When calculating the living wage, in-kind compensation is also included, such as transportation allowance, housing and free meals.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The [report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/verborgen-prijskaart-van-sociale-impact-Nederlandse-bedrijfsleven.html) delves deeper into the method and definition of underpayment. With a living wage, workers can afford a decent standard of living for themselves and their families. This includes not only basic needs such as food, water, and shelter, but also other essentials such as access to healthcare, education, and transportation. When calculating the living wage, in-kind compensation is also included, such as transportation allowance, housing and free meals. The living wage varies per country.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: With a living wage, workers can afford a decent standard of living for themselves and their families. This includes not only basic needs such as food, water, and shelter, but also other essentials such as access to healthcare, education, and transportation. When calculating the living wage, in-kind compensation is also included, such as transportation allowance, housing and free meals. The living wage varies per country. For example, the [Global Living Wage Coalition](https://www.globallivingwage.org/) shows that the living wage in the Ivory Coast is $317 per month and in Bangladesh $197 per month.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This includes not only basic needs such as food, water, and shelter, but also other essentials such as access to healthcare, education, and transportation. When calculating the living wage, in-kind compensation is also included, such as transportation allowance, housing and free meals. The living wage varies per country. For example, the [Global Living Wage Coalition](https://www.globallivingwage.org/) shows that the living wage in the Ivory Coast is $317 per month and in Bangladesh $197 per month. Within a country, the living wage also varies per region, for example due to the difference between urban versus rural areas.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: When calculating the living wage, in-kind compensation is also included, such as transportation allowance, housing and free meals. The living wage varies per country. For example, the [Global Living Wage Coalition](https://www.globallivingwage.org/) shows that the living wage in the Ivory Coast is $317 per month and in Bangladesh $197 per month. Within a country, the living wage also varies per region, for example due to the difference between urban versus rural areas. The living wage should not be confused with the statutory minimum wage, because the latter is set by the government and, in many cases, is lower than the living wage.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The living wage varies per country. For example, the [Global Living Wage Coalition](https://www.globallivingwage.org/) shows that the living wage in the Ivory Coast is $317 per month and in Bangladesh $197 per month. Within a country, the living wage also varies per region, for example due to the difference between urban versus rural areas. The living wage should not be confused with the statutory minimum wage, because the latter is set by the government and, in many cases, is lower than the living wage. From both a moral and legal perspective, it is essential as a company to ensure that employees, including those in the supply chain, can afford a decent standard of living.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: For example, the [Global Living Wage Coalition](https://www.globallivingwage.org/) shows that the living wage in the Ivory Coast is $317 per month and in Bangladesh $197 per month. Within a country, the living wage also varies per region, for example due to the difference between urban versus rural areas. The living wage should not be confused with the statutory minimum wage, because the latter is set by the government and, in many cases, is lower than the living wage. From both a moral and legal perspective, it is essential as a company to ensure that employees, including those in the supply chain, can afford a decent standard of living. Payment of living wages helps to limit other social risks, such as excessive working hours, unfair working environments, forced labor and child labor.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

The living wage should not be confused with the statutory minimum wage, because the latter is set by the government and, in many cases, is lower than the living wage. From both a moral and legal perspective, it is essential as a company to ensure that employees, including those in the supply chain, can afford a decent standard of living. Payment of living wages helps to limit other social risks, such as excessive working hours, unfair working environments, forced labor and child labor. Underpayment at employment agencies.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The living wage should not be confused with the statutory minimum wage, because the latter is set by the government and, in many cases, is lower than the living wage. From both a moral and legal perspective, it is essential as a company to ensure that employees, including those in the supply chain, can afford a decent standard of living. Payment of living wages helps to limit other social risks, such as excessive working hours, unfair working environments, forced labor and child labor. Underpayment at employment agencies. The greatest risk of underpayment occurs in the Business Services sector, especially among customers in the chain (downstream) (see Figure 1).

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: From both a moral and legal perspective, it is essential as a company to ensure that employees, including those in the supply chain, can afford a decent standard of living. Payment of living wages helps to limit other social risks, such as excessive working hours, unfair working environments, forced labor and child labor. Underpayment at employment agencies. The greatest risk of underpayment occurs in the Business Services sector, especially among customers in the chain (downstream) (see Figure 1). A large proportion of these are clients of employment agencies, such as horticultural companies where migrant workers work.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Payment of living wages helps to limit other social risks, such as excessive working hours, unfair working environments, forced labor and child labor. Underpayment at employment agencies. The greatest risk of underpayment occurs in the Business Services sector, especially among customers in the chain (downstream) (see Figure 1). A large proportion of these are clients of employment agencies, such as horticultural companies where migrant workers work. According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), employment agencies represent approximately one fifth of the sector based on added value.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Underpayment at employment agencies. The greatest risk of underpayment occurs in the Business Services sector, especially among customers in the chain (downstream) (see Figure 1). A large proportion of these are clients of employment agencies, such as horticultural companies where migrant workers work. According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), employment agencies represent approximately one fifth of the sector based on added value. On this basis, the social costs of underpayment would be 0.72 billion euros.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The greatest risk of underpayment occurs in the Business Services sector, especially among customers in the chain (downstream) (see Figure 1). A large proportion of these are clients of employment agencies, such as horticultural companies where migrant workers work. According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), employment agencies represent approximately one fifth of the sector based on added value. On this basis, the social costs of underpayment would be 0.72 billion euros. This is based on the assumption that the impact of underpayment is equally distributed across the branches within the Business Services sector.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: A large proportion of these are clients of employment agencies, such as horticultural companies where migrant workers work. According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), employment agencies represent approximately one fifth of the sector based on added value. On this basis, the social costs of underpayment would be 0.72 billion euros. This is based on the assumption that the impact of underpayment is equally distributed across the branches within the Business Services sector. This negative social impact is the responsibility of both the employment agencies and the hiring companies.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), employment agencies represent approximately one fifth of the sector based on added value. On this basis, the social costs of underpayment would be 0.72 billion euros. This is based on the assumption that the impact of underpayment is equally distributed across the branches within the Business Services sector. This negative social impact is the responsibility of both the employment agencies and the hiring companies. Although a large proportion of employment agencies comply with laws and regulations, estimates from the [Dutch Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nrc.nl/nieuws/2022/11/17/zon-2500-uitzendbureaus-overtegen-bewust-de-wet-a4148666) show that approximately 15 percent of employment agencies would have violated the law by 2022.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: On this basis, the social costs of underpayment would be 0.72 billion euros. This is based on the assumption that the impact of underpayment is equally distributed across the branches within the Business Services sector. This negative social impact is the responsibility of both the employment agencies and the hiring companies. Although a large proportion of employment agencies comply with laws and regulations, estimates from the [Dutch Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nrc.nl/nieuws/2022/11/17/zon-2500-uitzendbureaus-overtegen-bewust-de-wet-a4148666) show that approximately 15 percent of employment agencies would have violated the law by 2022. This usually concerns employment agencies that mediate in unskilled and low-skilled labor, where foreign workers are increasingly being used.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This is based on the assumption that the impact of underpayment is equally distributed across the branches within the Business Services sector. This negative social impact is the responsibility of both the employment agencies and the hiring companies. Although a large proportion of employment agencies comply with laws and regulations, estimates from the [Dutch Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nrc.nl/nieuws/2022/11/17/zon-2500-uitzendbureaus-overtegen-bewust-de-wet-a4148666) show that approximately 15 percent of employment agencies would have violated the law by 2022. This usually concerns employment agencies that mediate in unskilled and low-skilled labor, where foreign workers are increasingly being used. The [monitor](https://www.nlLabor Inspection.nl/publicaties/publicaties/2024/08/29/factsheet-laborsuitexploiting-en-ernstige-benadeling-2023) of the Dutch Labor Inspectorate for 2023 shows that most reports of labor exploitation and serious disadvantage came from the Business Services sector.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This negative social impact is the responsibility of both the employment agencies and the hiring companies. Although a large proportion of employment agencies comply with laws and regulations, estimates from the [Dutch Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nrc.nl/nieuws/2022/11/17/zon-2500-uitzendbureaus-overtegen-bewust-de-wet-a4148666) show that approximately 15 percent of employment agencies would have violated the law by 2022. This usually concerns employment agencies that mediate in unskilled and low-skilled labor, where foreign workers are increasingly being used. The [monitor](https://www.nlLabor Inspection.nl/publicaties/publicaties/2024/08/29/factsheet-laborsuitexploiting-en-ernstige-benadeling-2023) of the Dutch Labor Inspectorate for 2023 shows that most reports of labor exploitation and serious disadvantage came from the Business Services sector. The majority of these reports concerned employment agencies and to a lesser extent companies in the cleaning sector.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Although a large proportion of employment agencies comply with laws and regulations, estimates from the [Dutch Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nrc.nl/nieuws/2022/11/17/zon-2500-uitzendbureaus-overtegen-bewust-de-wet-a4148666) show that approximately 15 percent of employment agencies would have violated the law by 2022. This usually concerns employment agencies that mediate in unskilled and low-skilled labor, where foreign workers are increasingly being used. The [monitor](https://www.nlLabor Inspection.nl/publicaties/publicaties/2024/08/29/factsheet-laborsuitexploiting-en-ernstige-benadeling-2023) of the Dutch Labor Inspectorate for 2023 shows that most reports of labor exploitation and serious disadvantage came from the Business Services sector. The majority of these reports concerned employment agencies and to a lesser extent companies in the cleaning sector. These employment agencies provide employees to all kinds of other sectors.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This usually concerns employment agencies that mediate in unskilled and low-skilled labor, where foreign workers are increasingly being used. The [monitor](https://www.nlLabor Inspection.nl/publicaties/publicaties/2024/08/29/factsheet-laborsuitexploiting-en-ernstige-benadeling-2023) of the Dutch Labor Inspectorate for 2023 shows that most reports of labor exploitation and serious disadvantage came from the Business Services sector. The majority of these reports concerned employment agencies and to a lesser extent companies in the cleaning sector. These employment agencies provide employees to all kinds of other sectors. For example, almost half of the abuses involving serious disadvantage via employment agencies take place in the Industry sector.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The [monitor](https://www.nlLabor Inspection.nl/publicaties/publicaties/2024/08/29/factsheet-laborsuitexploiting-en-ernstige-benadeling-2023) of the Dutch Labor Inspectorate for 2023 shows that most reports of labor exploitation and serious disadvantage came from the Business Services sector. The majority of these reports concerned employment agencies and to a lesser extent companies in the cleaning sector. These employment agencies provide employees to all kinds of other sectors. For example, almost half of the abuses involving serious disadvantage via employment agencies take place in the Industry sector. This concerns, for example, Romanian and Polish temporary workers who work in the meat processing industry.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The majority of these reports concerned employment agencies and to a lesser extent companies in the cleaning sector. These employment agencies provide employees to all kinds of other sectors. For example, almost half of the abuses involving serious disadvantage via employment agencies take place in the Industry sector. This concerns, for example, Romanian and Polish temporary workers who work in the meat processing industry. Since January 1, 2025, the [Law on Allocation of Labor Forces by Intermediaries (Waadi)](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/wet-allocation- Arbeidskracht-door-intermediairs/) ensures that equal work is paid equally.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: These employment agencies provide employees to all kinds of other sectors. For example, almost half of the abuses involving serious disadvantage via employment agencies take place in the Industry sector. This concerns, for example, Romanian and Polish temporary workers who work in the meat processing industry. Since January 1, 2025, the [Law on Allocation of Labor Forces by Intermediaries (Waadi)](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/wet-allocation- Arbeidskracht-door-intermediairs/) ensures that equal work is paid equally. In the temporary employment collective labor agreements, this has been translated into the '[hirer's remuneration](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/inlenersbeloning/)'.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: For example, almost half of the abuses involving serious disadvantage via employment agencies take place in the Industry sector. This concerns, for example, Romanian and Polish temporary workers who work in the meat processing industry. Since January 1, 2025, the [Law on Allocation of Labor Forces by Intermediaries (Waadi)](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/wet-allocation- Arbeidskracht-door-intermediairs/) ensures that equal work is paid equally. In the temporary employment collective labor agreements, this has been translated into the '[hirer's remuneration](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/inlenersbeloning/)'. A temporary worker should earn the same as directly employed staff members.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This concerns, for example, Romanian and Polish temporary workers who work in the meat processing industry. Since January 1, 2025, the [Law on Allocation of Labor Forces by Intermediaries (Waadi)](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/wet-allocation- Arbeidskracht-door-intermediairs/) ensures that equal work is paid equally. In the temporary employment collective labor agreements, this has been translated into the '[hirer's remuneration](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/inlenersbeloning/)'. A temporary worker should earn the same as directly employed staff members. Other irregularities that occur in the industry and are not included in our underpayment indicator, include illegal employment, excessively long working hours and fictitious employment relationships.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Since January 1, 2025, the [Law on Allocation of Labor Forces by Intermediaries (Waadi)](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/wet-allocation- Arbeidskracht-door-intermediairs/) ensures that equal work is paid equally. In the temporary employment collective labor agreements, this has been translated into the '[hirer's remuneration](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/inlenersbeloning/)'. A temporary worker should earn the same as directly employed staff members. Other irregularities that occur in the industry and are not included in our underpayment indicator, include illegal employment, excessively long working hours and fictitious employment relationships. Temporary employment agencies often also fulfill the role of landlord, meaning that migrant workers lose their accommodation if they are dismissed.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: In the temporary employment collective labor agreements, this has been translated into the '[hirer's remuneration](https://www.zipconomy.nl/flexiconlijst/inlenersbeloning/)'. A temporary worker should earn the same as directly employed staff members. Other irregularities that occur in the industry and are not included in our underpayment indicator, include illegal employment, excessively long working hours and fictitious employment relationships. Temporary employment agencies often also fulfill the role of landlord, meaning that migrant workers lose their accommodation if they are dismissed. Since July 1, 2023, legislation has changed, meaning that work and residential contracts should be separated to reduce this dependency.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: A temporary worker should earn the same as directly employed staff members. Other irregularities that occur in the industry and are not included in our underpayment indicator, include illegal employment, excessively long working hours and fictitious employment relationships. Temporary employment agencies often also fulfill the role of landlord, meaning that migrant workers lose their accommodation if they are dismissed. Since July 1, 2023, legislation has changed, meaning that work and residential contracts should be separated to reduce this dependency. Some employment agencies abuse summary dismissal of migrant workers for financial gain, according to research by the [Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2024/05/23/ Abuse-van-ontslag-op-standing-voet-door-uitzendbureaus).

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Other irregularities that occur in the industry and are not included in our underpayment indicator, include illegal employment, excessively long working hours and fictitious employment relationships. Temporary employment agencies often also fulfill the role of landlord, meaning that migrant workers lose their accommodation if they are dismissed. Since July 1, 2023, legislation has changed, meaning that work and residential contracts should be separated to reduce this dependency. Some employment agencies abuse summary dismissal of migrant workers for financial gain, according to research by the [Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2024/05/23/ Abuse-van-ontslag-op-standing-voet-door-uitzendbureaus). In the event of immediate dismissal, employees no longer receive payments and lose their right to unemployment benefits. ##Certification of employment agencies.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Temporary employment agencies often also fulfill the role of landlord, meaning that migrant workers lose their accommodation if they are dismissed. Since July 1, 2023, legislation has changed, meaning that work and residential contracts should be separated to reduce this dependency. Some employment agencies abuse summary dismissal of migrant workers for financial gain, according to research by the [Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2024/05/23/ Abuse-van-ontslag-op-standing-voet-door-uitzendbureaus). In the event of immediate dismissal, employees no longer receive payments and lose their right to unemployment benefits. ##Certification of employment agencies. Various quality marks can help both hirers and lenders avoid doing business with fraudulent employment agencies.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Since July 1, 2023, legislation has changed, meaning that work and residential contracts should be separated to reduce this dependency. Some employment agencies abuse summary dismissal of migrant workers for financial gain, according to research by the [Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2024/05/23/ Abuse-van-ontslag-op-standing-voet-door-uitzendbureaus). In the event of immediate dismissal, employees no longer receive payments and lose their right to unemployment benefits. ##Certification of employment agencies. Various quality marks can help both hirers and lenders avoid doing business with fraudulent employment agencies. Hirers are wise to choose SNA-certified agencies (Stichting Arbeid Normering).

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Some employment agencies abuse summary dismissal of migrant workers for financial gain, according to research by the [Labor Inspectorate](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2024/05/23/ Abuse-van-ontslag-op-standing-voet-door-uitzendbureaus). In the event of immediate dismissal, employees no longer receive payments and lose their right to unemployment benefits. ##Certification of employment agencies. Various quality marks can help both hirers and lenders avoid doing business with fraudulent employment agencies. Hirers are wise to choose SNA-certified agencies (Stichting Arbeid Normering). This quality mark provides certainty that a temporary employment agency complies with legal obligations, such as the correct payment of payroll taxes.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: In the event of immediate dismissal, employees no longer receive payments and lose their right to unemployment benefits. ##Certification of employment agencies. Various quality marks can help both hirers and lenders avoid doing business with fraudulent employment agencies. Hirers are wise to choose SNA-certified agencies (Stichting Arbeid Normering). This quality mark provides certainty that a temporary employment agency complies with legal obligations, such as the correct payment of payroll taxes. It is also good to check whether the employment agency has a current WKA statement (Chain Liability Act).

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Various quality marks can help both hirers and lenders avoid doing business with fraudulent employment agencies. Hirers are wise to choose SNA-certified agencies (Stichting Arbeid Normering). This quality mark provides certainty that a temporary employment agency complies with legal obligations, such as the correct payment of payroll taxes. It is also good to check whether the employment agency has a current WKA statement (Chain Liability Act). This document proves that a temporary employment agency has correctly paid the payroll taxes to the Tax Authorities, so that the hirer is not at risk of being liable for any arrears.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Hirers are wise to choose SNA-certified agencies (Stichting Arbeid Normering). This quality mark provides certainty that a temporary employment agency complies with legal obligations, such as the correct payment of payroll taxes. It is also good to check whether the employment agency has a current WKA statement (Chain Liability Act). This document proves that a temporary employment agency has correctly paid the payroll taxes to the Tax Authorities, so that the hirer is not at risk of being liable for any arrears. If migrant workers are housed, as a hirer, check whether the employment agency has the SNF quality mark (Stichting Normering Flexwonen), which guarantees annual checks on housing standards.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This quality mark provides certainty that a temporary employment agency complies with legal obligations, such as the correct payment of payroll taxes. It is also good to check whether the employment agency has a current WKA statement (Chain Liability Act). This document proves that a temporary employment agency has correctly paid the payroll taxes to the Tax Authorities, so that the hirer is not at risk of being liable for any arrears. If migrant workers are housed, as a hirer, check whether the employment agency has the SNF quality mark (Stichting Normering Flexwonen), which guarantees annual checks on housing standards. Until now, the temporary employment sector has relied on self-regulation, such as the SNA quality mark.

Because the abuses have not yet been resolved, the cabinet has submitted a proposal for the Admission to the Disposal of Labor Forces Act (WTTA).

If migrant workers are housed, as a hirer, check whether the employment agency has the SNF quality mark (Stichting Normering Flexwonen), which guarantees annual checks on housing standards. Until now, the temporary employment sector has relied on self-regulation, such as the SNA quality mark. Because the abuses have not yet been resolved, the cabinet has submitted a proposal for the Admission to the Disposal of Labor Forces Act (WTTA). The essence of this law is dual responsibility.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: If migrant workers are housed, as a hirer, check whether the employment agency has the SNF quality mark (Stichting Normering Flexwonen), which guarantees annual checks on housing standards. Until now, the temporary employment sector has relied on self-regulation, such as the SNA quality mark. Because the abuses have not yet been resolved, the cabinet has submitted a proposal for the Admission to the Disposal of Labor Forces Act (WTTA). The essence of this law is dual responsibility. All employment agencies must be certified in order to send out workers.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Until now, the temporary employment sector has relied on self-regulation, such as the SNA quality mark. Because the abuses have not yet been resolved, the cabinet has submitted a proposal for the Admission to the Disposal of Labor Forces Act (WTTA). The essence of this law is dual responsibility. All employment agencies must be certified in order to send out workers. In addition, companies that hire these workers must check whether they are working with a certified agency.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Because the abuses have not yet been resolved, the cabinet has submitted a proposal for the Admission to the Disposal of Labor Forces Act (WTTA). The essence of this law is dual responsibility. All employment agencies must be certified in order to send out workers. In addition, companies that hire these workers must check whether they are working with a certified agency. Although the WTTA has been postponed, it is wise for an employment agency to prepare for this; to ensure that it can meet requirements such as paying a deposit and proving correct employment conditions and payments.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The essence of this law is dual responsibility. All employment agencies must be certified in order to send out workers. In addition, companies that hire these workers must check whether they are working with a certified agency. Although the WTTA has been postponed, it is wise for an employment agency to prepare for this; to ensure that it can meet requirements such as paying a deposit and proving correct employment conditions and payments. By following these steps, both hirers and lenders can contribute to a transparent and fair temporary employment industry, and protect themselves against legal and financial risks.

text: Although the WTTA has been postponed, it is wise for an employment agency to prepare for this; to ensure that it can meet requirements such as paying a deposit and proving correct employment conditions and payments. By following these steps, both hirers and lenders can contribute to a transparent and fair temporary employment industry, and protect themselves against legal and financial risks. Underpayment in Transport & Logistics. Abuses also occur in other sectors. In the transport sector, foreign truck drivers are [with some regularity](https://www.ela.europa.eu/en/news/companies-operating-across-eu-borders-checked-compliance-wage-regulations) or have to spend weeks in their [truck spend](https://www.nu.nl/economie/6349040/buitenlandse-truckers-flink-uitgebuit-ze-zit-met-gasbranders-in-hun-cabine.html?referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bing.com%2F), fueled by the pressure to provide cheap and flexible transport.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: By following these steps, both hirers and lenders can contribute to a transparent and fair temporary employment industry, and protect themselves against legal and financial risks. Underpayment in Transport & Logistics. Abuses also occur in other sectors. In the transport sector, foreign truck drivers are [with some regularity](https://www.ela.europa.eu/en/news/companies-operating-across-eu-borders-checked-compliance-wage-regulations) or have to spend weeks in their [truck spend](https://www.nu.nl/economie/6349040/buitenlandse-truckers-flink-uitgebuit-ze-zit-met-gasbranders-in-hun-cabine.html?referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bing.com%2F), fueled by the pressure to provide cheap and flexible transport. This is evident from [inspections](https://www.nlLaborInspection.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/04/12/overstromenen-bij-transportbedrijven-in-nederland-en-bulgarije) by the Labor Inspectorate and the Human Environment and Transport Inspectorate (ILT) and has also been stated by the [National Rapporteur Human trafficking](https://eenvandaag.avrotros.nl/item/vrachtwagenrijders-van-buiten-eu-op-grote-scale-uitgebuit-in-nederland-fnv-wil-dat-inspection-harder-ingrijpt/).

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Underpayment in Transport & Logistics. Abuses also occur in other sectors. In the transport sector, foreign truck drivers are [with some regularity](https://www.ela.europa.eu/en/news/companies-operating-across-eu-borders-checked-compliance-wage-regulations) or have to spend weeks in their [truck spend](https://www.nu.nl/economie/6349040/buitenlandse-truckers-flink-uitgebuit-ze-zit-met-gasbranders-in-hun-cabine.html?referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bing.com%2F), fueled by the pressure to provide cheap and flexible transport. This is evident from [inspections](https://www.nlLaborInspection.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/04/12/overstromenen-bij-transportbedrijven-in-nederland-en-bulgarije) by the Labor Inspectorate and the Human Environment and Transport Inspectorate (ILT) and has also been stated by the [National Rapporteur Human trafficking](https://eenvandaag.avrotros.nl/item/vrachtwagenrijders-van-buiten-eu-op-grote-scale-uitgebuit-in-nederland-fnv-wil-dat-inspection-harder-ingrijpt/). Drivers, sometimes from outside the EU, are hired through foreign employment agencies or transport companies from countries with lower labor costs, such as Lithuania or Poland.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Abuses also occur in other sectors. In the transport sector, foreign truck drivers are [with some regularity](https://www.ela.europa.eu/en/news/companies-operating-across-eu-borders-checked-compliance-wage-regulations) or have to spend weeks in their [truck spend](https://www.nu.nl/economie/6349040/buitenlandse-truckers-flink-uitgebuit-ze-zit-met-gasbranders-in-hun-cabine.html?referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bing.com%2F), fueled by the pressure to provide cheap and flexible transport. This is evident from [inspections](https://www.nlLaborInspection.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/04/12/overstromenen-bij-transportbedrijven-in-nederland-en-bulgarije) by the Labor Inspectorate and the Human Environment and Transport Inspectorate (ILT) and has also been stated by the [National Rapporteur Human trafficking](https://eenvandaag.avrotros.nl/item/vrachtwagenrijders-van-buiten-eu-op-grote-scale-uitgebuit-in-nederland-fnv-wil-dat-inspection-harder-ingrijpt/). Drivers, sometimes from outside the EU, are hired through foreign employment agencies or transport companies from countries with lower labor costs, such as Lithuania or Poland. Although they work in the Netherlands, their employment conditions are based on the rules of the country of origin, which often results in lower wages and less protection.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: In the transport sector, foreign truck drivers are [with some regularity](https://www.ela.europa.eu/en/news/companies-operating-across-eu-borders-checked-compliance-wage-regulations) or have to spend weeks in their [truck spend](https://www.nu.nl/economie/6349040/buitenlandse-truckers-flink-uitgebuit-ze-zit-met-gasbranders-in-hun-cabine.html?referrer=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bing.com%2F), fueled by the pressure to provide cheap and flexible transport. This is evident from [inspections](https://www.nlLaborInspection.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/04/12/overstromenen-bij-transportbedrijven-in-nederland-en-bulgarije) by the Labor Inspectorate and the Human Environment and Transport Inspectorate (ILT) and has also been stated by the [National Rapporteur Human trafficking](https://eenvandaag.avrotros.nl/item/vrachtwagenrijders-van-buiten-eu-op-grote-scale-uitgebuit-in-nederland-fnv-wil-dat-inspection-harder-ingrijpt/). Drivers, sometimes from outside the EU, are hired through foreign employment agencies or transport companies from countries with lower labor costs, such as Lithuania or Poland. Although they work in the Netherlands, their employment conditions are based on the rules of the country of origin, which often results in lower wages and less protection. According to the Labor Inspectorate, there was underpayment in parcel delivery, which often involves subcontractors.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This is evident from [inspections](https://www.nlLaborInspection.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/04/12/overstromenen-bij-transportbedrijven-in-nederland-en-bulgarije) by the Labor Inspectorate and the Human Environment and Transport Inspectorate (ILT) and has also been stated by the [National Rapporteur Human trafficking](https://eenvandaag.avrotros.nl/item/vrachtwagenrijders-van-buiten-eu-op-grote-scale-uitgebuit-in-nederland-fnv-wil-dat-inspection-harder-ingrijpt/). Drivers, sometimes from outside the EU, are hired through foreign employment agencies or transport companies from countries with lower labor costs, such as Lithuania or Poland. Although they work in the Netherlands, their employment conditions are based on the rules of the country of origin, which often results in lower wages and less protection. According to the Labor Inspectorate, there was underpayment in parcel delivery, which often involves subcontractors. The Labor Inspectorate [investigated](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/12/21/measures-packageserviceproviders-om-eerlijker-te-werken) into both transport between distribution centers and home delivery and discovered problems such as underpayment, illegal labor and excessively long working hours.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Drivers, sometimes from outside the EU, are hired through foreign employment agencies or transport companies from countries with lower labor costs, such as Lithuania or Poland. Although they work in the Netherlands, their employment conditions are based on the rules of the country of origin, which often results in lower wages and less protection. According to the Labor Inspectorate, there was underpayment in parcel delivery, which often involves subcontractors. The Labor Inspectorate [investigated](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/12/21/measures-packageserviceproviders-om-eerlijker-te-werken) into both transport between distribution centers and home delivery and discovered problems such as underpayment, illegal labor and excessively long working hours. After intervention by the Labor Inspectorate, the companies investigated improved their working methods.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Although they work in the Netherlands, their employment conditions are based on the rules of the country of origin, which often results in lower wages and less protection. According to the Labor Inspectorate, there was underpayment in parcel delivery, which often involves subcontractors. The Labor Inspectorate [investigated](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/12/21/measures-packageserviceproviders-om-eerlijker-te-werken) into both transport between distribution centers and home delivery and discovered problems such as underpayment, illegal labor and excessively long working hours. After intervention by the Labor Inspectorate, the companies investigated improved their working methods. (Sub)contractors indicated that their clients had taken steps to ensure fairer labor practices and reduce illegal labor.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: According to the Labor Inspectorate, there was underpayment in parcel delivery, which often involves subcontractors. The Labor Inspectorate [investigated](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/12/21/measures-packageserviceproviders-om-eerlijker-te-werken) into both transport between distribution centers and home delivery and discovered problems such as underpayment, illegal labor and excessively long working hours. After intervention by the Labor Inspectorate, the companies investigated improved their working methods. (Sub)contractors indicated that their clients had taken steps to ensure fairer labor practices and reduce illegal labor. The Sham Constructions Act (WAS) was introduced in phases between 2015 and 2017 to combat abuses in the labor market, such as sham constructions in which employees are underpaid or labor rights are circumvented.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The Labor Inspectorate [investigated](https://www.nllaborsonderzoek.nl/actueel/nieuws/2022/12/21/measures-packageserviceproviders-om-eerlijker-te-werken) into both transport between distribution centers and home delivery and discovered problems such as underpayment, illegal labor and excessively long working hours. After intervention by the Labor Inspectorate, the companies investigated improved their working methods. (Sub)contractors indicated that their clients had taken steps to ensure fairer labor practices and reduce illegal labor. The Sham Constructions Act (WAS) was introduced in phases between 2015 and 2017 to combat abuses in the labor market, such as sham constructions in which employees are underpaid or labor rights are circumvented. An important element in the law is chain liability; prime contractors can be held liable for paying subcontractor employees the correct wages.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: After intervention by the Labor Inspectorate, the companies investigated improved their working methods. (Sub)contractors indicated that their clients had taken steps to ensure fairer labor practices and reduce illegal labor. The Sham Constructions Act (WAS) was introduced in phases between 2015 and 2017 to combat abuses in the labor market, such as sham constructions in which employees are underpaid or labor rights are circumvented. An important element in the law is chain liability; prime contractors can be held liable for paying subcontractor employees the correct wages. Main contractors are therefore partly responsible for correct wage payments in the chain.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: (Sub)contractors indicated that their clients had taken steps to ensure fairer labor practices and reduce illegal labor. The Sham Constructions Act (WAS) was introduced in phases between 2015 and 2017 to combat abuses in the labor market, such as sham constructions in which employees are underpaid or labor rights are circumvented. An important element in the law is chain liability; prime contractors can be held liable for paying subcontractor employees the correct wages. Main contractors are therefore partly responsible for correct wage payments in the chain. The law has contributed to awareness and compliance with employment conditions, especially through the increased liability of main contractors.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The Sham Constructions Act (WAS) was introduced in phases between 2015 and 2017 to combat abuses in the labor market, such as sham constructions in which employees are underpaid or labor rights are circumvented. An important element in the law is chain liability; prime contractors can be held liable for paying subcontractor employees the correct wages. Main contractors are therefore partly responsible for correct wage payments in the chain. The law has contributed to awareness and compliance with employment conditions, especially through the increased liability of main contractors. Violations [still sometimes occur](https://www.omroepbrabant.nl/nieuws/4598616/illegale-woonpleks-en-onderpaid-drivers-bij-transportbedrijven), but it seems that the vast majority of companies in the Transport & Logistics sector have their affairs in order.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: An important element in the law is chain liability; prime contractors can be held liable for paying subcontractor employees the correct wages. Main contractors are therefore partly responsible for correct wage payments in the chain. The law has contributed to awareness and compliance with employment conditions, especially through the increased liability of main contractors. Violations [still sometimes occur](https://www.omroepbrabant.nl/nieuws/4598616/illegale-woonpleks-en-onderpaid-drivers-bij-transportbedrijven), but it seems that the vast majority of companies in the Transport & Logistics sector have their affairs in order. metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Main contractors are therefore partly responsible for correct wage payments in the chain. The law has contributed to awareness and compliance with employment conditions, especially through the increased liability of main contractors. Violations [still sometimes occur](https://www.omroepbrabant.nl/nieuws/4598616/illegale-woonpleks-en-onderpaid-drivers-bij-transportbedrijven), but it seems that the vast majority of companies in the Transport & Logistics sector have their affairs in order. Underpayment in the global value chain. The International Labor Organization (ILO) [estimates](https://www.ilo.org/sites/default/files/wcmsp5/groups/public/%40dgreports/%40inst/documents/publication/wcms_908142.pdf) that approximately 665 million people worldwide earned less than $3.65 per day in 2023, including the lowest economic class, around 241 million workers even fell below the World Bank-defined poverty line of $2.15 per day.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

Underpayment in the global value chain. The International Labor Organization (ILO) [estimates](https://www.ilo.org/sites/default/files/wcmsp5/groups/public/%40dgreports/%40inst/documents/publication/wcms_908142.pdf) that approximately 665 million people worldwide earned less than $3.65 per day in 2023, including the lowest economic class, around 241 million workers even fell below the World Bank-defined poverty line of $2.15 per day. These are also called the 'working poor'; people with jobs who earn too little to lift themselves and their families out of extreme or moderate poverty.

These are also called the 'working poor'; people with jobs who earn too little to lift themselves and their families out of extreme or moderate poverty. The clothing industry is often mentioned when discussing underpayment in the value chain.

The clothing industry is often mentioned when discussing underpayment in the value chain. In our analysis, this is part of the Industry sector. metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: These are also called the 'working poor'; people with jobs who earn too little to lift themselves and their families out of extreme or moderate poverty. The clothing industry is often mentioned when discussing underpayment in the value chain. In our analysis, this is part of the Industry sector. Industry has the second highest risk of underpayment (see Figure 1). metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: The clothing industry is often mentioned when discussing underpayment in the value chain. In our analysis, this is part of the Industry sector. Industry has the second highest risk of underpayment (see Figure 1). In 2022, spending on clothing and textiles in the Netherlands amounted to almost 17 billion euros, according to [CBS data](https://opendata.cbs.nl/#/CBS/nl/dataset/84093NED/table?searchKeywords=kosten%20kleding). Many clothing brands and stores have developed into international players that outsource parts of their production process such as purchasing materials, sewing and packaging to various suppliers and producers worldwide through all kinds of complex and opaque chains.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: In our analysis, this is part of the Industry sector. Industry has the second highest risk of underpayment (see Figure 1). In 2022, spending on clothing and textiles in the Netherlands amounted to almost 17 billion euros, according to [CBS data](https://opendata.cbs.nl/#/CBS/nl/dataset/84093NED/table?searchKeywords=kosten%20kleding). Many clothing brands and stores have developed into international players that outsource parts of their production process such as purchasing materials, sewing and packaging to various suppliers and producers worldwide through all kinds of complex and opaque chains. Much of the clothing is therefore produced in low-wage countries such as Bangladesh, India, Cambodia and China.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Industry has the second highest risk of underpayment (see Figure 1). In 2022, spending on clothing and textiles in the Netherlands amounted to almost 17 billion euros, according to [CBS data](https://opendata.cbs.nl/#/CBS/nl/dataset/84093NED/table?searchKeywords=kosten%20kleding). Many clothing brands and stores have developed into international players that outsource parts of their production process such as purchasing materials, sewing and packaging to various suppliers and producers worldwide through all kinds of complex and opaque chains. Much of the clothing is therefore produced in low-wage countries such as Bangladesh, India, Cambodia and China. In those countries, working conditions are often poor and wages are below the living wage.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: In 2022, spending on clothing and textiles in the Netherlands amounted to almost 17 billion euros, according to [CBS data](https://opendata.cbs.nl/#/CBS/nl/dataset/84093NED/table?searchKeywords=kosten%20kleding). Many clothing brands and stores have developed into international players that outsource parts of their production process such as purchasing materials, sewing and packaging to various suppliers and producers worldwide through all kinds of complex and opaque chains. Much of the clothing is therefore produced in low-wage countries such as Bangladesh, India, Cambodia and China. In those countries, working conditions are often poor and wages are below the living wage. Research by [Clean Clothes Campaign](https://www.schonekleren.nl/fashionchecker/) from 2020 showed that 93 percent of the 108 clothing brands surveyed in Europe, Great Britain and the United States could not provide evidence that living wages were paid in any of their factories.

Research by [Clean Clothes Campaign](https://www.schonekleren.nl/fashionchecker/) from 2020 showed that 93 percent of the 108 clothing brands surveyed in Europe, Great Britain and the United States could not provide evidence that living wages were paid in any of their factories. Improve working conditions in the clothing industry through the efforts of the Fair Wear Foundation.

text: Much of the clothing is therefore produced in low-wage countries such as Bangladesh, India, Cambodia and China. In those countries, working conditions are often poor and wages are below the living wage. Research by [Clean Clothes Campaign](https://www.schonekleren.nl/fashionchecker/) from 2020 showed that 93 percent of the 108 clothing brands surveyed in Europe, Great Britain and the United States could not provide evidence that living wages were paid in any of their factories. Improve working conditions in the clothing industry through the efforts of the Fair Wear Foundation. Fair Wear, founded in 1999, is committed to improving working conditions in the clothing industry worldwide.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

Research by [Clean Clothes Campaign](https://www.schonekleren.nl/fashionchecker/) from 2020 showed that 93 percent of the 108 clothing brands surveyed in Europe, Great Britain and the United States could not provide evidence that living wages were paid in any of their factories. Improve working conditions in the clothing industry through the efforts of the Fair Wear Foundation. Fair Wear, founded in 1999, is committed to improving working conditions in the clothing industry worldwide. This initiative brings together brands, factories, workers, unions, NGOs and other industry stakeholders.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Research by [Clean Clothes Campaign](https://www.schonekleren.nl/fashionchecker/) from 2020 showed that 93 percent of the 108 clothing brands surveyed in Europe, Great Britain and the United States could not provide evidence that living wages were paid in any of their factories. Improve working conditions in the clothing industry through the efforts of the Fair Wear Foundation. Fair Wear, founded in 1999, is committed to improving working conditions in the clothing industry worldwide. This initiative brings together brands, factories, workers, unions, NGOs and other industry stakeholders. This ambitious collaboration is important to enable coordination and make the clothing sector fair for everyone.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Improve working conditions in the clothing industry through the efforts of the Fair Wear Foundation. Fair Wear, founded in 1999, is committed to improving working conditions in the clothing industry worldwide. This initiative brings together brands, factories, workers, unions, NGOs and other industry stakeholders. This ambitious collaboration is important to enable coordination and make the clothing sector fair for everyone. Fair Wear uses standards that are based on the due diligence guidelines of the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) for the textile and clothing industry. “Being able to pay a living wage to garment workers is about cents in the actual consumer price, and cooperation between brands that produce in the same factory is essential,” says Jesse Bloemendaal, Policy Coordinator at Fair Wear.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: Fair Wear, founded in 1999, is committed to improving working conditions in the clothing industry worldwide. This initiative brings together brands, factories, workers, unions, NGOs and other industry stakeholders. This ambitious collaboration is important to enable coordination and make the clothing sector fair for everyone. Fair Wear uses standards that are based on the due diligence guidelines of the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) for the textile and clothing industry. “Being able to pay a living wage to garment workers is about cents in the actual consumer price, and cooperation between brands that produce in the same factory is essential,” says Jesse Bloemendaal, Policy Coordinator at Fair Wear. Fair Wear facilitates collaboration between brands, for example by linking brands that produce in the same factories to set joint goals and coordinate actions.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This initiative brings together brands, factories, workers, unions, NGOs and other industry stakeholders. This ambitious collaboration is important to enable coordination and make the clothing sector fair for everyone. Fair Wear uses standards that are based on the due diligence guidelines of the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) for the textile and clothing industry. “Being able to pay a living wage to garment workers is about cents in the actual consumer price, and cooperation between brands that produce in the same factory is essential,” says Jesse Bloemendaal, Policy Coordinator at Fair Wear. Fair Wear facilitates collaboration between brands, for example by linking brands that produce in the same factories to set joint goals and coordinate actions. Through joint actions, brands can increase their influence, resulting in better working conditions and more effective compliance with Fair Wear's guidelines.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

text: This ambitious collaboration is important to enable coordination and make the clothing sector fair for everyone. Fair Wear uses standards that are based on the due diligence guidelines of the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) for the textile and clothing industry. “Being able to pay a living wage to garment workers is about cents in the actual consumer price, and cooperation between brands that produce in the same factory is essential,” says Jesse Bloemendaal, Policy Coordinator at Fair Wear. Fair Wear facilitates collaboration between brands, for example by linking brands that produce in the same factories to set joint goals and coordinate actions. Through joint actions, brands can increase their influence, resulting in better working conditions and more effective compliance with Fair Wear's guidelines. In addition, Fair Wear offers training and tools where brands can share practical knowledge and best practices on matters such as sustainable purchasing practices, living wages, workplace safety and workers' rights.

metadata.source_title: Underpayment is a lasting social problem

Fair Wear facilitates collaboration between brands, for example by linking brands that produce in the same factories to set joint goals and coordinate actions. Through joint actions, brands can increase their influence, resulting in better working conditions and more effective compliance with Fair Wear's guidelines. In addition, Fair Wear offers training and tools where brands can share practical knowledge and best practices on matters such as sustainable purchasing practices, living wages, workplace safety and workers' rights. This makes it possible for brands to be stronger together in their pursuit of fair production.
